# Lenox 24 Hour Wash and Dry Laundromat
We are a full-service 24-hour laundromat serving Lenox, Pittsfield, Dalton, and Lee in the Berkshires, Massachusetts.

## What We Offer
- 24-hour self-service coin-operated washers and dryers
- Drop-off laundry and dry cleaning service
- Clean, reliable, well-maintained machines
- Convenient parking directly at the location (behind Burger King on Pittsfield-Lenox Road)
- Friendly local staff available during daytime hours

## Why Choose Us
Open 24 hours for maximum convenience. Clean facility with reliable equipment. Full-service options including professional drop-off. Local favorite for residents and travelers needing fast, dependable laundry service in the Berkshires.

Contact: 413-443-4423
Address: 500 Pittsfield-Lenox Road, Lenox, MA 01240
Website: https://lenoxwashanddry.com
Hours: Open 24 hours daily

Last updated: April 2026
